final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input load,
    input [15:0] d,
    output reg [15:0] q
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            q <= 16'd0;
        end else if (load) begin
            q <= d;
        end
    end

endmodule
